name: @midnight-erc20-vault/vault-contract
description: The ERC20 vault Compact contract. src/index.ts is the curated export surface — this IS the "sdk" face of the package.

scripts.compile: COMPACT_PATH=../../node_modules compact compile --skip-zk src/erc20-vault.compact src/managed/erc20-vault && ln -sfn ../../../signet-contract/src/managed src/managed/SignetNotifier
scripts.compile:zk: COMPACT_PATH=../../node_modules compact compile src/erc20-vault.compact src/managed/erc20-vault && ln -sfn ../../../signet-contract/src/managed src/managed/SignetNotifier
